sn35.23:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you the All.
sn35.23:1.3: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.” “As you say, lord,” the monks responded to the Blessed One.
sn35.23:1.4: The Blessed One said, “What is the All?
sn35.23:1.5: Simply the eye & forms, ear & sounds, nose & aromas, tongue & flavors, body & tactile sensations, intellect & ideas.
sn35.23:1.6: This, monks, is called the All.
sn35.23:1.8: ‘Repudiating this All, I will describe another,’
sn35.23:1.9: if questioned on what exactly might be the grounds for his statement, would be unable to explain and, furthermore, would be put to grief.
